flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Missouri-St Louis rose 23% between 2021 and 2024 ($28.5k → $35.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Missouri-St Louis fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (5.7k → 5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Missouri-St Louis fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
